trip_wires.title: Fetch-by-SHA requires network access at activation
trip_wires.workaround: Pre-fetch + artifact-cache OR mirror upstream OR OCP egress NetworkPolicy allowing github.com
trip_wires.fsi_impact: Air-gapped FSI environments not directly supported — operator must mitigate

trip_wires.title: FIPS only effective on FIPS-at-install OCP cluster
trip_wires.workaround: OCP must be installed with fips: true in install-config.yaml; post-install FIPS not supported by Red Hat
trip_wires.fsi_impact: Silent FSI compliance failure if spec.tls.fips.enabled set on non-FIPS OCP — verify before applying layer 02

trip_wires.title: No native Dynatrace Kafka Connector
trip_wires.workaround: HTTP Sink connector (confluentinc/kafka-connect-http) POSTing to Dynatrace generic log ingest API v2; see layers/04-audit/connect-cr.yaml
trip_wires.fsi_impact: DT log processing pipelines must parse Confluent audit event schema manually (no first-party connector)

trip_wires.title: Control Center next-gen s390x image availability unverified
trip_wires.workaround: Use Control Center classic (included in CP 8.2.0 s390x images) until next-gen image is verified via docker manifest inspect
trip_wires.fsi_impact: FSI operators may need to fall back to C3 classic UI until verification completes

trip_wires.title: SR bootstrap Job base image must be s390x
trip_wires.workaround: Use registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal:latest — UBI9 has s390x multi-arch manifests; verify with docker manifest inspect
trip_wires.fsi_impact: Air-gapped clusters need a verified s390x base image mirror

trip_wires.title: x86 node-agent sidecars (Splunk/DT) have QEMU overhead
trip_wires.workaround: Route audit events via Kafka Connect (Connect-based SIEM shipping) instead of node-agent sidecars; layers/04-audit/connect-cr.yaml implements this
trip_wires.fsi_impact: 2-5x CPU penalty avoided by design — do not add x86 sidecars to CP pods

trip_wires.title: Flox manifest.lock stub must be regenerated
trip_wires.workaround: On a machine with Flox installed, run flox activate in accelerators/confluent-on-linuxone/ to generate a real lock file; commit the result
trip_wires.fsi_impact: First-run developer experience requires manual lock-file generation; not blocking but breaks zero-friction onboarding

trip_wires.title: Custom s390x Connect image required
trip_wires.workaround: docker buildx build --platform linux/s390x with Splunk Sink + HTTP Sink JARs pre-installed; base = confluentinc/confluent-kafka-connect:8.2.0
trip_wires.fsi_impact: FSI operator must own a private registry for s390x Connect image; cannot use upstream confluentinc registry directly

trip_wires.title: Cluster Linking schema sync (CP 8.2+) needs verification
trip_wires.workaround: Test schema sync in a staging environment; fall back to manual SR migration tool if needed; see MIGRATION.md §2.4
trip_wires.fsi_impact: Schema migration during x86→LinuxONE cutover may require manual SR migration tool until sync feature validated

trip_wires.title: FKO + CMF are parallel Helm operators outside the kustomize build
trip_wires.workaround: Install via RUNBOOK Step 1b: ansible-playbook ansible/playbooks/flink_operators.yml (readiness-gated); --check mode for audit-only
trip_wires.fsi_impact: kustomize build | oc apply is no longer self-sufficient — operators must be installed first or FlinkApplication CRs are rejected

trip_wires.title: CFK 3.2.0+ on s390x officially supports only Flink Applications
trip_wires.workaround: Layer 05 (Flink) is the officially supported s390x CFK use case; layers 01-04 are run-at-your-own-risk per Confluent's statement
trip_wires.fsi_impact: FSI operators must understand support boundary — layers 01-04 (Kafka, SR, Connect, C3) are not officially supported by Confluent on s390x in CFK 3.2.x

trip_wires.title: Custom s390x SQL-runner image required before FlinkApplications start
trip_wires.workaround: docker buildx build --platform linux/s390x per layers/05-flink/sql-runner/README.md; replace all <PLACEHOLDER_CP_FLINK_SQL_RUNNER_IMAGE> references
trip_wires.fsi_impact: Pods fail image pull until SQL-runner image is built and pushed to FSI's private registry; layer 05 dead-letter without it

trip_wires.title: Flink checkpoint state encryption — cluster-dependent
trip_wires.workaround: Use an OCP StorageClass with encryption: true OR S3-compatible endpoint with SSE-KMS; replace placeholder in layers/05-flink/flink-environment.yaml
trip_wires.fsi_impact: Regulatory finding under PCI-DSS 3.4 + GLBA if checkpoints unencrypted — sensitive in-flight data (transaction amounts, account numbers) at risk
